{# academic-research.html — Clean scholarly style for papers and lectures #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "simple", "font_heading": "Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif", "font_body": "Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif", "heading_color": "#1a202c", "text_color": "#1a202c", "accent_color": "#744210", "link_hover": "#5a3510", "table_header_bg": "#744210", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(116,66,16,0.05)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(116,66,16,0.04)", "code_bg": "#f5f0eb" } %} {% set transition = "fade" %} {% block extra_css %} .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1 { font-size: 2.0em; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h3 { font-style: italic; font-weight: normal; color: {{ style.accent_color }}; } .reveal blockquote { border-left-color: {{ style.accent_color }}; font-size: 0.95em; } .reveal .footnote { font-size: 0.7em; color: #718096; position: absolute; bottom: 1em; left: 1em; } {% endblock %}
